classes.name: Barbarian

attribute_requirements.note: Optional. Suffer -10% XP if not met.

classes.armor: Padded cloth, leather, studded leather, hide. Bucklers and small shields only.

classes.name: Bard
classes.alignment: Any neutral (must have neutrality on one axis)
classes.weapon_restriction: Any weapon no larger than the bard
classes.armor: Leather, padded, studded leather, brigandine, elven/mithral chain. No shields.

attribute_requirements.note: Suffer -10% XP if both INT < 12 and CHA < 14.

classes.name: Cleric
classes.alignment: Within one step of deity's alignment

attribute_requirements.note: Optional. Suffer -10% XP if not met.

prime_example.note: Specific mythoi may require additional attributes.

classes.armor: Any. Shields allowed. Weapon restrictions vary by mythos.

classes.name: Druid

attribute_requirements.note: Optional. Suffer -10% XP if not met.

classes.armor: Leather, padded, hide. Wooden shields only.

attribute_requirements.note: Optional. Suffer -10% XP if not met.

classes.name: Monk

attribute_requirements.note: Optional. Suffer -10% XP if not met.

classes.weapon_restriction: Any weapon no larger than the monk, with exception of ranged or martial arts

classes.name: Paladin
classes.alignment_note: Gnomes and half-orcs often fail to qualify due to chaotic/evil tendencies.

attribute_requirements.note: Optional. Suffer -10% XP if not met.

spellcasting.access: Limited divine spells at higher levels

classes.name: Ranger
classes.alignment: Any good (lawful good, neutral good, chaotic good)

attribute_requirements.note: Optional. Suffer -10% XP if not met.

classes.armor: Any (some abilities penalized in heavy armor).

spellcasting.access: Limited divine spells at higher levels

classes.name: Thief

attribute_requirements.note: Optional. Suffer -10% XP if not met.

classes.armor: Leather, padded, studded leather, brigandine, elven/mithral chain. No shields.

classes.name: Wizard
classes.allowed_ancestries_note: Dwarves and gnomes cannot be wizards (Magic Disruption). Exception: gnomes may be specialist illusionists.

attribute_requirements.note: Optional. Suffer -10% XP if not met.

prime_example.note: Gnome illusionists with INT 16+ also qualify.

classes.armor: None. Cannot cast spells with somatic components while armored (unless Light Armor Use talent).

spellcasting.access: All schools (generalist) or restricted by specialization
